text.title: Blameless Retro Template (Human Facilitation) Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example applying this methodology to a concrete scenario.

example.title: Friday 4pm deploy incident
example.code:
INC-2026-042: prod deploy at Fri 16:00 introduced 502s for 22 min.
Timeline (20 min): deploy at 16:00 → first 502 at 16:03 → page at 16:15 → rollback at 16:22. Reframe: 'the deploy pipeline allowed an untested deploy at 4pm Friday' (not 'Bob deployed').
Factors (25 min): (1) tooling-gap: --skip-tests flag usable outside hotfix; (2) detection-gap: page latency 12 min; (3) tooling-gap: no Friday-after-3pm soft-block.
Actions (15 min): (a) alex.k by 2026-06-15: replace --skip-tests with hotfix-mode-incident-id; (b) jane.s by 2026-06-08: add Friday-late-deploy soft-warning. Top-3 set.
Meta (10 min): 'Almost learned: ownerless flags persist across reorgs.' → cross-incident pattern, will surface in next retro.
Publish (5 min): retro-record posted to wiki/postmortems within meeting; published_within_48h=true.
example.note: End-to-end trace through the 6-step procedure landing all 5 rules.
